calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2026 Continued To Oct-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Mar-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Roy Enav, Esq., QUILL & ARROW, LLP., (310) 933-4271 renav@quillarrowlaw.com Attorney for Plaintiffs, LATEEFAN NISHA AND SHAHEED ALI
Samantha M. Geraghty, Esq., EVANS FEARS SCHUTTERT MCNULTY MICKUS (949) 301-9464 sgeraghty@efsmmlaw.com Attorney for Defendant AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies and adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LATEEFAN ALI , AN INDIVIDUAL, SHAHEED ALI'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One from defendant American Honda Motor Co., Inc. (AHM) is granted in part and denied in part. The court orders AHM to pay $1000 in sanctions to Plaintiff within 30 court days of this order. (see word minutes for complete ruling)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-09-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
